title: Alpha-Theta-Beta Feedback
description: Three independent audio channels: alpha, theta, and combined beta (Beta + Hi-Beta). Each drives its own base/clear scene.

threshold_window_sec.label: Threshold window
threshold_window_sec.description: How far into the past thresholds look. Lower reacts faster; higher adapts more slowly.

clarity_at_threshold.label: Threshold clarity
clarity_at_threshold.description: Clarity value at each reward threshold.

alpha_reward_pct.label: Alpha reward
alpha_reward_pct.description: Target percentage of alpha samples expected to reward.

theta_reward_pct.label: Theta reward
theta_reward_pct.description: Target percentage of theta samples expected to reward.

beta_reward_pct.label: Beta reward
beta_reward_pct.description: Target percentage of beta samples expected to reward.
